emails.subject: Crude and product market size
emails.body: Crude and product market size John, I previously asked you to quantify the global size of your business (in Billions) and you sent me a voice mail on it. I have misplaced that note and don't remember the global size for the presentation. Please re-provide as a return email. Sorry for the inconvenience. Mike

emails.subject: Re: Crude and product market size
emails.body: Re: Crude and product market size mike had to dig myself the numbers i gave you are as follows:Physical crude production 76 million bbls per day,products production assuming no loss also 76 million bbls. The traded market crude physical 35 million bbls and financial 120 million bbls. Products 20 million bbls an financially 80 million bbls. assuming 20 dollar/ bbl crude and 30 dollar/bbl products if you need a value for the market.
